subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad-Quli! Bear thou witness unto that which the Wronged One hath testified - that there is none other God but Him, the Single One, the All-Informed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد قبل قلی اشهد بما شهد المظلوم انه لا اله الا هو الفرد الخبیر ثم اشهد
subcodes.subjects: @thankfulness; gratitude, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @banishment to; life in 'Akka
